item.title: 今晚最后的工作，做 wanman 的高并发测试，以往我们使用本地 coding agent 一次只能开一个窗口 review 代码，但对于「评估项目中各种状态机的设计，稳定性和潜在风险，全面 revi...
item.author: @turingou

item.title:
you are empowered to create, whether you think of yourself as a software engineer or not.
you can p...
item.description:
you are empowered to create, whether you think of yourself as a software engineer or not.
you can prompt for apps and games in natural language (https://t.co/hKn40pkm3q), and can make spreadsheets, slides, diagrams, docs, marketing materials: https://t.co/tiAhtTi21d
--- @gdb | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 1632
item.author: @gdb

item.title: Think about how many “weather” apps and “dashboards” you saw on behance and dribbble in the pre-AI e...
item.description:
Think about how many “weather” apps and “dashboards” you saw on behance and dribbble in the pre-AI era
All hallucinations
--- @thenanyu | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 30
item.author: @thenanyu

item.title: Meet Xiaoling: China’s Modular Humanoid #Robot with Swappable Heads and Multi-Role Capabilities by @...
item.description:

item.title:
@Kimi_Moonshot See the announcement thread for full details:
https://t.co/u0QQAEaDdR
item.author: @NousResearch

item.title: this has one of the most exciting launch weeks in OpenAI's history, with a goal of making agents mor...
item.description:
this has one of the most exciting launch weeks in OpenAI's history, with a goal of making agents more real, useful, and accessible for all our users.
codex can now smartly do much more on your computer, remember more of your context, and run more ongoing work independently.
--- @gdb | ❤️ 91 | 🔁 7 | 💬 14 | 👁 4101
item.author: @gdb

item.title: Ironically, the so-called “anti-hate” groups have an incredibly strong financial incentive to stoke ...
item.description:
Ironically, the so-called “anti-hate” groups have an incredibly strong financial incentive to stoke hate, so they actually AMPLIFY hate!
The worst thing that could happen to them is actually ending hate, as they would cease to exist.
--- @elonmusk | ❤️ 5033 | 🔁 736 | 💬 750 | 👁 482026
item.author: @elonmusk

item.title:

item.description:

item.title: @Kimi_Moonshot CORRECTION: The Hackathon has been extended to May 3rd
item.author: @NousResearch

item.title:
The Hermes Agent Creative Hackathon ends in 9 days
Build a creative project with Hermes for a chan...
item.description:
The Hermes Agent Creative Hackathon ends in 9 days
Build a creative project with Hermes for a chance to win from the $26,000 prize pool sponsored by @Kimi_Moonshot!
We asked Hermes Agent to generate 1000 ideas for you: https://t.co/PabKZSjWV8
--- @NousResearch | ❤️ 109 | 🔁 6 | 💬 12 | 👁 22435
item.author: @NousResearch
